@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

rem === folder to read ===
set "ROOT=%~dp0"

rem === sorted file list ===
for /f "delims=" %%F in ('dir /b /a:-d "%ROOT%" ^| sort') do (
    echo </pre><pre>----- %%F -----
    type "%ROOT%%%F"
    echo.
)
